description: Square toed, black formal shoes with low top styling and central lace upsSynthetic leather upper with wingtip detail, dotted patterns and brogue designs on the upper, overlays and reinforced heel collarSoft inner, cushioned footbed and branding at the heel on the footbedTough textured outsole with a stacked heelWarranty: 30 days against manufacturing defectsWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
